facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 115 reviews. One dish on the menu that matters.

Cua 350 does crab noodle soup the way Phu Quoc locals have eaten it for decades. Rich broth, fresh crab, no tourist markup. This tiny bistro on Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is the real deal.

Find it at 38 Đ. 30 Tháng 4, khu phố 1, Phú Quốc.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch that broth hit the bowl. Cua 350 is pulling 4.9 stars for a reason. Fresh crab, deep flavor, zero fuss. This is what locals eat in Phú Quốc.
